title: Add contrast slot for score-level procedure and evaluation panels
description: Score-level View Procedures and View Evaluations replacement panels need a distinct flat brown-themed background slot behind their task cards so ProcedureTask and EvaluationTask cards have enough contrast. Keep this scoped to score-level panels, not version tabs.

comments.author: ryan
comments.text: Added an explicit score-level slot surface for the View Procedures and View Evaluations replacement panels. The slot uses a flat warning-themed background and suppresses muted row wrappers so ProcedureTask and EvaluationTask cards have stronger contrast. Version-scoped tabs remain on the plain surface. Focused tests and dashboard typecheck pass.
